content: Generated Phase 4 Cloud Sync walkthrough at docs/walkthroughs/phase4-cloud-sync-walkthrough.md. Covers: optional auth philosophy (ADR-0012), SupabaseService guard pattern, auth providers, SyncRepository UPSERT idempotency (ADR-0004), sync providers, PostgreSQL schema with RLS policies, UI integration (SyncStatusIndicator, SettingsScreen Cloud Sync card, AuthScreen), Edge Function JWT upgrade, end-to-end data flow trace from endSession through UPSERT to RLS validation.
